title: Return Seven
description: Define a function named `answer` with no parameters. It should **return** the integer `7`. In Python, `print` shows output to the user; `return` hands a value back to the caller—here we only need `return`.
constraints: The function name must be exactly `answer`.

hint_plan.level_1: The tests call `answer()` and check the returned value.
hint_plan.level_4: Run passes when visible and hidden checks agree with the reference behavior.
